description_long: This is a red, flexible plastic pouch containing tomato ketchup, branded as 'Gibs Tomato Ketchup.' The front of the pouch features vibrant graphics of a tomato, ketchup, and fried snacks, along with the text 'The Perfect Dip' and a serving suggestion. The pouch has a spout at the top for dispensing, which is sealed with a small gray cap. The back of the pouch displays nutritional information, ingredients, and additional branding details. The overall shape is a flattened, slightly curved rectangle with a gusseted bottom for standing upright. The packaging is glossy and smooth, with clear, colorful printing and a modern, appetizing design.
description: A glossy red plastic pouch of Gibs Tomato Ketchup with vibrant food graphics, a spout cap, and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Gibs brand logo, 'Tomato Ketchup' text, food imagery, and the spout cap at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pouch and the edge of the spout cap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional facts, ingredients, and additional product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge and a partial view of the back label.
attribute_brand_logo: A square logo with the word 'Gibs' in black text on a white background, located near the top center of the front face.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows images of tomatoes and ketchup, and the text 'Tomato Ketchup' clearly indicates tomato flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the pouch.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The phrase 'The Perfect Dip' is prominently displayed on the front as a promotional slogan.
